summary: Ad Reporting System testing completed successfully. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified report dialog, admin reports page, and all action buttons work correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/report/reasons - all reasons have id and name fields
GET /api/report/reasons - includes all expected reason types (spam, inappropriate, scam, duplicate, wrong_category, illegal, personal_info, other)
GET /api/admin/reports - response has correct structure (reports, total, page, pages, stats)
GET /api/admin/reports - stats have all status counts (pending, reviewed, dismissed, action_taken)
Full report flow integration test passed
frontend_verified: AdDetailPage - Report button (data-testid='report-ad-btn') visible and clickable
AdDetailPage - Report dialog opens with title 'Raportează Anunțul'
AdDetailPage - Report dialog shows all 8 report reasons
AdDetailPage - User can select a reason (highlighted when selected)
AdDetailPage - Optional description textarea present and fillable
AdDetailPage - Duplicate report shows error toast 'Ai raportat deja acest anunț'
AdminPage - 'Rapoarte' link visible in sidebar navigation
AdminPage - Reports page loads with title 'Rapoarte Anunțuri'
AdminPage - Stats cards show counts for: În Așteptare, Verificate, Acțiune Luată, Respinse
AdminPage - Report cards show: status badge, date, ad title link, reason, description
AdminPage - Action buttons present: Respinge, Avertizează, Suspendă, Șterge Anunț
AdminPage - Filter tabs work (clicking changes displayed reports)
AdminPage - Ad title links to ad detail page
seed_data_creation: Admin password was reset to 'admin123' (SHA256 hash) for testing. One test report exists in database for ad 'Apartament 2 camere București Sector 1' with reason 'Spam sau conținut fals'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ad Reporting System fully tested and working: 1) GET /api/report/reasons returns 8 report reasons. 2) POST /api/ads/{ad_id}/report creates reports with reason and optional description. 3) GET /api/admin/reports returns reports list with stats (requires admin auth). 4) PUT /api/admin/reports/{report_id} updates report status and takes action. 5) Frontend AdDetailPage has Report button that opens dialog with all 8 reasons. 6) Frontend AdminPage has Reports section in sidebar with stats cards and action buttons (Respinge, Avertizează, Suspendă, Șterge Anunț).
